project_type: React 19 + Vite 7 + TailwindCSS 4 frontend (pnpm monorepo) with Django 5.2 backend
build_system: pnpm monorepo with workspace packages. Root vitest for smoke tests. artifacts/edms has its own vitest.config.ts for feature tests.
test_framework: Vitest with jsdom environment, @testing-library/react. Tests co-located with source (*.test.ts). Setup file at src/test/setup.ts provides localStorage and matchMedia mocks.
build_command: cd /projects/sandbox/LDO-2-local && npx tsc --noEmit && cd artifacts/edms && npx vite build
test_command: cd /projects/sandbox/LDO-2-local && npx vitest run && cd artifacts/edms && npx vitest run
verification_instructions: 1. npx tsc --noEmit (0 errors). 2. npx vitest run (5 root smoke tests pass). 3. cd artifacts/edms && npx vitest run (all feature tests pass, ignoring 2 pre-existing throttle/theme failures).
setup_instructions: pnpm install (already done). No additional setup needed.
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - cannot install new packages. Must use existing deps only. No Docker daemon. No external HTTP calls.
contribution_requirements: Conventional commits. Zero TS errors. All new tests pass. Files under 800 lines. No hardcoded Tailwind colors.
key_patterns: Services use localStorage-backed mock data with typed interfaces. Tests use vi.mock for feature flags. Hooks follow React patterns with useRef/useState/useEffect. Lib modules are pure utility functions with JSDoc comments and section dividers (horizontal rules). Feature flags gate new functionality via isFeatureEnabled().
directory_structure: Root: monorepo with pnpm-workspace.yaml. artifacts/edms/src/lib/ = pure utilities. artifacts/edms/src/services/ = service classes. artifacts/edms/src/hooks/ = React hooks. artifacts/edms/src/components/ = UI components. config/ = YAML config files. backend/ = Django app. src/test/ = root test setup.
